content.problemStatement:
### **Aptitude Practice Question** A man borrowed a certain sum of money at the rate of 6 % per annum for the first two years, 9% per annum for the next three years, and 14% per annum for the period beyond 5 years. If he pays a total interest of Rs. 22,800 at the end of 9 years, find the amount he borrowed. Solution: 

Let the borrowed sum be P. SI for first 2 years + SI for next 3 years + SI for next 4 years = 22800 (P x 6 x 2 / 100) + (P x 9 x 3 / 100) + (P x 14 x 4 / 100) = 22800 95 P / 100 = 22800 P = 24000 Therefore, Borrowed sum = Rs. 24,000
